title: Real HP, two decimals
description: Float HP rendered above the heart bar. The vanilla heart row reads 7 hearts (14); TruHeart shows 14.02 — the value Minecraft is actually computing.

title: Absorption inline, in gold
description: When absorption is active (golden apple etc.), the overlay extends with `+ N` in gold so you see the hidden float behind the gold hearts.

title: Y-offset clears armor and absorption rows
description: The overlay automatically steps up to clear armor icons and gold absorption hearts so it never overlaps vanilla HUD.
